trending_videos.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
A Brand New Day starts now.
Watch the official trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, exclusively in theatres July 31. Play Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, available now in the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog.

trending_videos.title: First Round: North Dakota State vs. Michigan State
trending_videos.description: No. 14 Bison and No. 3 Spartans play in a first-round matchup of the NCAA Men's Tournament. North Dakota State enters the game focused on execution, while Michigan State counters with a veteran poise. One team will move a step closer to glory.

trending_videos.title: SPIDERMAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Every Easter Egg & Detail You Missed!
trending_videos.description:
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer FRAME BY FRAME Breakdown & Analysis by New Rockstars’ Erik Voss! Get 10% off your first month of therapy at https://betterhelp.com/NewRockstars. #spiderman #spidermanbrandnewday #trailer  #sponsored

Here is EVERYTHING you missed in the trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day (2026) - every clue for the MUTANTS, Jean Grey, even ROGUE?? What was removed from this trailer? Will Daredevil appear in this movie? Will Norman Osborn? Will Bruce Banner’s “savage” Hulk form? How will this movie set up Avengers Doomsday and Secret Wars? Erik Voss breaks down this trailer frame by frame for every callback to Andrew Garfield Spider-Man and Tobey Maguire Spider-Man and why these callbacks are so important to what’s really happening to Tom Holland Peter Parker in this movie!

We're back at the UCB Theater in Los Angeles on April 17th, come in person or stream anywhere. Tickets: https://ucbcomedy.com/show/new-rockstars-live-its-morbin-time

NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK
youtube.

spider-man brand new day trailer reaction

trending_videos.title: First Round: Hawaii vs. Arkansas
trending_videos.description: No.4 Arkansas faces No.13 Hawaii in first-round matchup of the postseason NCAA Men's Tournament. The Razorbacks rely on veteran leadership to navigate the bracket. Hawaii enters the game aiming to disrupt the tempo and secure a major tournament win.

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

trending_videos.title: First Round: McNeese State vs. Vanderbilt
trending_videos.description: No.5 Vanderbilt and No.12 McNeese square off in the opening round of this South region matchup. Vanderbilt seeks to navigate past the intense pressure of McNeese to keep its season going. Both teams fight for a spot in the regional semifinals.

trending_videos.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

trending_videos.title: Gutfeld!
trending_videos.description: Gutfeld! Looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features refreshing takes on the day's top headlines from FNC personalities, authors, politicians, veterans and comedians.

trending_videos.title: Cryo Archive Launch Trailer | Marathon
trending_videos.description:
//: ALL NODES RESOLVED 
//: UESC MARATHON ACCESS: INITIATED 
|| countdown engaged 
|| the marathon is waking 

The final ARG puzzle has been resolved in a massive community effort orchestrated by #breach-protocol in the official Marathon Discord. 

But this isn’t the end. Aboard the Marathon, you’ll face labyrinthian corridors, raid-like puzzles, and seven frozen Vaults leading to an entity even the UESC fears. 
 
The Marathon is waking. Prepare. Coming March 20, 2026. 

Purchase Marathon now:
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b

Follow Marathon:
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame

creator_patterns.description: Each of the top channels has only one video trending, suggesting a wide variety of content creators can achieve trending status with the right content during peak interest periods.

content_creation.description: Given the popularity of trailer breakdowns, content creators can capitalize on this trend by producing detailed analysis videos with insights and Easter eggs, particularly for anticipated movies and franchises.

sports content.description: With sports videos trending, channels can explore live commentary, post-game analysis, and highlights to attract dedicated sports fans and enhance viewer engagement.

engagement.description: The average views per video suggest a high engagement level with the content currently trending, particularly for movies and sports-related videos.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
